name: Discourse Forum
description: Discourse forum integration — read, search, filter topics and posts, manage user content, and create/update topics via agent tools.

apiKey.description: Discourse API key. Required for write tools and private categories. Read tools work without it on public forums.

apiUsername.description: Discourse API username (default: 'system'). Used with apiKey for authenticated requests.

staffUsernames.description: Usernames to treat as staff when checking for unanswered topics.

categories.description: Category slugs to scope tools to. Leave empty for all categories.

allowWrites.description: Enable write tools (create_post, create_topic, update_topic). Requires apiKey. Default: false.

staffUsernames.label: Staff Usernames
staffUsernames.help: Topics answered by these users are considered resolved in the unanswered tool

categories.label: Category Scope
categories.help: Restrict tools to these category slugs. Leave empty for all.

allowWrites.label: Enable Write Tools
allowWrites.help: Allow create_post, create_topic, and update_topic. Requires an API key.
